name: ConvertKit
description: ConvertKit (Kit) email marketing platform for creators. Manage subscribers, forms, sequences, tags, and email automations.

credential_fields.name: apiSecret
credential_fields.label: Api Secret
credential_fields.description: ConvertKit API secret (for subscriber management endpoints)

tools.name: list_subscribers
tools.description: List all subscribers in your ConvertKit/Kit account. Supports cursor-based pagination and filtering by status. Returns subscriber email, name, state, and metadata.

after.description: Pagination cursor to get the next page of results.

before.description: Pagination cursor to get the previous page of results.

tools.name: get_subscriber
tools.description: Retrieve a specific subscriber by their ID. Returns full subscriber details including email, name, state, created date, and custom fields.

subscriber_id.description: The unique ID of the subscriber to retrieve.

tools.name: create_subscriber
tools.description: Create a new subscriber in ConvertKit/Kit. Optionally add them directly to a specific form. Provide the subscriber's email address and optional first name and custom fields.

fields.description: Custom field values as key-value pairs (e.g. {"last_name": "Doe", "company": "Acme"}).

tools.name: list_forms
tools.description: List all forms in your ConvertKit/Kit account. Returns form names, types, IDs, and subscriber counts. Supports cursor-based pagination.

status.description: Filter forms by status. Defaults to 'active'.

after.description: Pagination cursor to get the next page of results.

tools.name: list_sequences
tools.description: List all email sequences (autoresponders) in your ConvertKit/Kit account. Returns sequence names, IDs, and subscriber counts.

after.description: Pagination cursor to get the next page of results.

tools.name: list_tags
tools.description: List all tags in your ConvertKit/Kit account. Returns tag names, IDs, and subscriber counts. Tags are used to organize and segment subscribers.

after.description: Pagination cursor to get the next page of results.

tools.name: tag_subscriber
tools.description: Apply a tag to an existing subscriber. The subscriber must already exist in your account. Use List Tags to find the tag ID and List/Get Subscriber to find the subscriber ID.

tag_id.description: The ID of the tag to apply.

subscriber_id.description: The ID of the subscriber to tag.
